channel.title: Barry Michael Doyle
channel.description: Writing from Barry Michael Doyle on software engineering, open source, and building products.

item.title: Why I Built Patch Pulse
item.description: The problem that led me to build Patch Pulse, from Slack notifications to a monorepo-aware CLI and an in-progress VS Code extension.

item.title: If I could start my dev career again: Tips for Newbies
item.description: A look at what I would do differently if I were to start over in my career
